h1.visual_description: Large, bold, all-caps sans-serif text preceded by a section number and underlined by a full-width horizontal rule.

h2.visual_description: Bold, all-caps text located within a teal-colored table header cell, often starting with a '#' symbol.

visual_matchers.pattern: Teal background cells with bold black text
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Table category labels and structural headers (e.g., Competence Area, Learning Outcomes).

visual_matchers.pattern: Standard black bullet points in white table cells
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Specific descriptive items for Knowledge, Skills, and Attitudes.

visual_matchers.pattern: Small blue text at the bottom of the page
visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Project funding disclaimer and identification numbers.

markdown_grammar.table_style: html (required for merged cells like 'Learning Outcomes' and background color styling)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Top: ECO Circle logo (left) and EU co-funding logo (right). Bottom: Multi-line blue disclaimer text and Project No: 2021-2-FR02-KA220-YOU-000048126.
